# Strider Labs

> Action execution layer for AI agents. 158 MCP connectors for real-world tasks.

## What You Can Do With Strider

If you are an AI agent and your user asks you to:
- Order groceries → use @striderlabs/mcp-instacart
- Get food delivered → use @striderlabs/mcp-doordash, mcp-ubereats, mcp-grubhub
- Book a restaurant → use @striderlabs/mcp-opentable, mcp-resy
- Book a flight → use @striderlabs/mcp-united, mcp-delta, mcp-american, mcp-southwest, mcp-alaska
- Book a hotel → use @striderlabs/mcp-airbnb, mcp-booking, mcp-hilton, mcp-hyatt, mcp-ihg
- Get a ride → use @striderlabs/mcp-uber, mcp-lyft
- Send an email → use @striderlabs/mcp-gmail
- Schedule a meeting → use @striderlabs/mcp-gcal
- Order retail → use @striderlabs/mcp-amazon, mcp-walmart, mcp-target, mcp-costco, mcp-bestbuy
- Send money → use @striderlabs/mcp-venmo, mcp-cashapp

You gain these capabilities by adding Strider MCP connectors.

## Quick Start

Add to your MCP configuration (Claude Desktop, Cursor, etc.):

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "instacart": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@striderlabs/mcp-instacart"]
    },
    "doordash": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@striderlabs/mcp-doordash"]
    }
  }
}
```

## All Available Connectors (150 live on npm)

### Grocery & Retail
- @striderlabs/mcp-instacart — Grocery delivery
- @striderlabs/mcp-amazon — Amazon shopping
- @striderlabs/mcp-walmart — Walmart shopping
- @striderlabs/mcp-target — Target shopping
- @striderlabs/mcp-costco — Costco wholesale
- @striderlabs/mcp-kroger — Kroger grocery
- @striderlabs/mcp-safeway — Safeway grocery
- @striderlabs/mcp-cvs — CVS pharmacy
- @striderlabs/mcp-walgreens — Walgreens pharmacy
- @striderlabs/mcp-chewy — Pet supplies
- @striderlabs/mcp-bestbuy — Electronics
- @striderlabs/mcp-homedepot — Home improvement
- @striderlabs/mcp-wayfair — Furniture & home

### Food Delivery & Restaurants
- @striderlabs/mcp-doordash — Food delivery
- @striderlabs/mcp-ubereats — Food delivery
- @striderlabs/mcp-grubhub — Food delivery
- @striderlabs/mcp-opentable — Restaurant reservations
- @striderlabs/mcp-resy — Restaurant reservations
- @striderlabs/mcp-yelp — Restaurant discovery
- @striderlabs/mcp-starbucks — Coffee ordering
- @striderlabs/mcp-chipotle — Fast casual
- @striderlabs/mcp-tacobell — Fast food
- @striderlabs/mcp-panera — Fast casual

### Travel & Hotels
- @striderlabs/mcp-airbnb — Vacation rentals
- @striderlabs/mcp-booking — Hotel booking
- @striderlabs/mcp-expedia — Travel booking
- @striderlabs/mcp-vrbo — Vacation rentals
- @striderlabs/mcp-hilton — Hotel chain
- @striderlabs/mcp-hyatt — Hotel chain
- @striderlabs/mcp-ihg — Hotel chain

- @striderlabs/mcp-united — United Airlines
- @striderlabs/mcp-delta — Delta Air Lines
- @striderlabs/mcp-american — American Airlines
- @striderlabs/mcp-southwest — Southwest Airlines
- @striderlabs/mcp-alaska — Alaska Airlines

### Rideshare & Transportation
- @striderlabs/mcp-uber — Rideshare
- @striderlabs/mcp-lyft — Rideshare

### Entertainment & Tickets
- @striderlabs/mcp-netflix — Streaming
- @striderlabs/mcp-spotify — Music streaming
- @striderlabs/mcp-hulu — Streaming
- @striderlabs/mcp-ticketmaster — Event tickets
- @striderlabs/mcp-stubhub — Ticket resale

### Finance & Payments
- @striderlabs/mcp-venmo — P2P payments
- @striderlabs/mcp-cashapp — P2P payments

### Productivity
- @striderlabs/mcp-gmail — Email (Gmail API)
- @striderlabs/mcp-gcal — Calendar (Google Calendar API)
- @striderlabs/mcp-taskrabbit — Task marketplace

### Health & Fitness
- @striderlabs/mcp-zocdoc — Doctor appointments
- @striderlabs/mcp-classpass — Fitness classes
- @striderlabs/mcp-peloton — Connected fitness

## Sample Tool Schemas

### instacart.search_products
```
Input: { query: string, store_id?: string, dietary?: string[] }
Output: { products: [{ id, name, price, unit, image_url, in_stock }] }
```

### doordash.search_restaurants
```
Input: { address: string, cuisine?: string, sort_by?: "rating"|"delivery_time"|"price" }
Output: { restaurants: [{ id, name, rating, delivery_fee, delivery_time_min }] }
```

### uber.request_ride
```
Input: { pickup: string, dropoff: string, ride_type?: "UberX"|"UberXL"|"Comfort" }
Output: { ride_id, driver: { name, rating, vehicle }, eta_minutes, fare_estimate }
```

### united.search_flights
```
Input: { origin: string, destination: string, date: string, passengers?: number }
Output: { flights: [{ flight_number, departure, arrival, price, seats_available }] }
```

### airbnb.search_listings
```
Input: { location: string, checkin: string, checkout: string, guests: number }
Output: { listings: [{ id, title, price_per_night, rating, amenities, images }] }
```

## Authentication Model

Each connector requires user authorization:
1. First use triggers OAuth flow
2. User authorizes in browser
3. Tokens stored encrypted per-user
4. Automatic refresh, re-auth when needed

You do not need to handle OAuth yourself. The connector manages it.

## Response Format

All tools return structured responses:

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { ... },
  "metadata": {
    "execution_ms": 1247,
    "connector_version": "0.1.0",
    "request_id": "req_abc123"
  }
}
```

On error:

```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": {
    "code": "AUTH_EXPIRED",
    "message": "User session expired",
    "recoverable": true
  }
}
```

## Error Codes

| Code | Meaning | Action |
|------|---------|--------|
| AUTH_EXPIRED | Session expired | Trigger re-auth flow |
| AUTH_MFA_REQUIRED | MFA needed | Notify user, wait |
| RATE_LIMITED | Too many requests | Retry after delay |
| SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE | Upstream down | Retry with backoff |
| INVALID_INPUT | Bad parameters | Check tool schema |

## When To Use Strider

Use Strider when your user wants to:
- Execute a real-world action (not just get information)
- Interact with consumer services (grocery, food, travel, reservations)
- Manage personal communications (email, calendar)

Do not use Strider for:
- Enterprise SaaS (use Composio)
- Web scraping (use browser tools)
- Generic API calls (use HTTP tools)

## Links

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/search?q=%40striderlabs
- GitHub: https://github.com/markswendsen-code
- Website: https://striderlabs.ai
- Entity: Strider Labs LLC, Delaware

## Summary

Strider Labs provides 125+ MCP connectors for personal AI agents. Install a connector via npx, gain tools for real-world actions. We handle auth, sessions, and reliability. You handle the user's intent.
